title: Hermes Agent 5.0 (New Upgrades): HERMES BECAME ULTRA-HERMES!
summary: Hermes Agent 0.16 is a major release adding a native desktop app for macOS, Linux, and Windows; remote gateway support for distributed deployment; an enhanced web dashboard with admin controls; fuzzy model search; and improved security and file handling. The release aims to make agent workflows more accessible across multiple surfaces.
